esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*
// Sequential scans on large tables suggest missing indexes; table-level metric (production)
| WHERE postgresql.sequential_scans IS NOT NULL
| EVAL seq_scans_val = TO_DOUBLE(postgresql.sequential_scans)
| WHERE seq_scans_val > 0
| STATS seq_scan_count = SUM(seq_scans_val) BY service.instance.id, postgresql.database.name
// Threshold: > 1000 scans in window; adjust for table count and workload
| WHERE seq_scan_count > 1000
